summary: Added pp:no-error-path-probe to find/market/menu-diff/price-check (unknown service/city is a valid empty result, not an error) and raised the default --rate-limit to 4 so fan-out commands return promptly.
reason: Novel scan/filter commands return empty (exit 0) for unmatched queries; and the conservative 2 req/s default made cross-business scans exceed the live probe budget.
